name: Animated Statue
description: An ancient stone guardian brought to life by forgotten magic. Its movements are slow but unstoppable, stone limbs grinding as it defends the ruins.

attacks.name: Stone Fist
attacks.description: A crushing blow from a massive stone fist

special_abilities.name: Stone Resilience
special_abilities.description: Resistant to slashing and piercing damage. Takes half damage from non-magical weapons.

special_abilities.name: Relentless
special_abilities.description: Never flees from combat, fights to destruction

behavior.notes: Mindless construct. Attacks nearest target. Never retreats.
